products.name: Black Forest Cake
products.description: A classic German-inspired delight layered with moist chocolate sponge, fresh whipped cream, and Morello cherries. Finished with dark chocolate shavings and whole cherries on top.
products.ingredients: Chocolate sponge, whipped cream, Morello cherries, dark chocolate shavings, sugar syrup

products.name: Red Velvet Cake
products.description: Our signature Red Velvet Cake with its gorgeous crimson layers, velvety texture, and luscious cream cheese frosting. A showstopper for any occasion.
products.ingredients: Red velvet sponge, cream cheese frosting, buttermilk, cocoa powder, vanilla

products.name: Chocolate Truffle Cake
products.description: Rich, decadent, and utterly irresistible. Our Chocolate Truffle Cake is made with premium Belgian chocolate ganache over moist chocolate sponge layers.
products.ingredients: Belgian dark chocolate, chocolate sponge, heavy cream, cocoa powder, butter

products.name: Designer Birthday Cake
products.description: Make every birthday unforgettable with our custom designer birthday cakes. Choose your flavor, design, and personalized message. Made fresh to order.
products.ingredients: Vanilla/chocolate sponge, buttercream, fondant, edible decorations, personalized message

products.name: Princess Theme Cake
products.description: A magical princess-themed birthday cake adorned with edible tiara, fondant roses, and shimmery pearl decorations. Perfect for little royals.
products.ingredients: Vanilla sponge, strawberry buttercream, white fondant, edible glitter, sugar flowers

products.name: Classic Wedding Cake (3-tier)
products.description: An elegant 3-tier classic wedding cake draped in smooth white fondant with delicate sugar flowers and gold ribbon. The ultimate centerpiece for your special day.
products.ingredients: Vanilla & almond sponge, white fondant, sugar flowers, gold leaf, pearl beads

products.name: Floral Wedding Cake (2-tier)
products.description: A stunning 2-tier wedding cake adorned with fresh and sugar flowers in blush pink and white. Romantic, elegant, and absolutely beautiful.
products.ingredients: Champagne sponge, rose buttercream, fresh edible flowers, fondant

products.name: Vanilla Cupcake
products.description: Light, fluffy vanilla cupcakes topped with swirled buttercream frosting, sprinkles, and a cherry. Perfect for parties or a sweet treat any day.
products.ingredients: All-purpose flour, vanilla extract, butter, eggs, buttercream frosting, sprinkles

products.name: Chocolate Cupcake
products.description: Moist chocolate cupcakes with rich chocolate ganache frosting and chocolate chips. A chocoholic's dream in every bite.
products.ingredients: Dark cocoa, all-purpose flour, eggs, butter, chocolate ganache, chocolate chips

products.name: Butter Cookies (Box of 12)
products.description: Melt-in-your-mouth Danish-style butter cookies with a perfectly crisp yet tender texture. Baked daily with pure butter and natural vanilla.
products.ingredients: Pure butter, flour, sugar, vanilla extract, eggs

products.name: Choco Chip Cookies (Box of 12)
products.description: Golden, chewy cookies loaded with semi-sweet chocolate chips. Baked to perfection — crispy on the edges, soft in the center.
products.ingredients: Butter, brown sugar, eggs, vanilla, flour, chocolate chips, baking soda

products.name: Almond Croissant
products.description: Flaky, buttery croissants filled with almond cream (frangipane) and topped with toasted almond flakes and powdered sugar. A Parisian classic.
products.ingredients: Butter, flour, almond cream, sliced almonds, powdered sugar, eggs

products.name: Cinnamon Roll
products.description: Soft, pillowy cinnamon rolls swirled with cinnamon sugar and drizzled with cream cheese icing. Warm, comforting, and absolutely divine.
products.ingredients: Flour, butter, cinnamon, brown sugar, cream cheese, vanilla, yeast

products.name: Garlic Herb Bread
products.description: Freshly baked pull-apart garlic bread infused with herb butter, minced garlic, and Italian seasoning. Crispy outside, soft inside. Perfect with soups.
products.ingredients: Sourdough bread, butter, fresh garlic, parsley, oregano, sea salt

products.name: Whole Wheat Bread
products.description: Wholesome, hearty whole wheat bread made with 100% whole wheat flour. Dense, nutritious, with a nutty flavor. Baked fresh every morning.
products.ingredients: Whole wheat flour, water, yeast, salt, olive oil, honey

products.name: Chocolate Donut
products.description: Fluffy ring donuts dipped in rich chocolate glaze and topped with rainbow sprinkles. Light, airy inside with a perfectly sweet chocolate coating.
products.ingredients: All-purpose flour, yeast, eggs, butter, dark chocolate glaze, sprinkles

products.name: Glazed Strawberry Donut
products.description: Soft, pillowy donuts with a vibrant pink strawberry glaze and crushed freeze-dried strawberries on top. A fruity, fun indulgence.
products.ingredients: Flour, yeast, eggs, butter, strawberry glaze, freeze-dried strawberries

products.name: Belgian Chocolate Truffles (Box of 6)
products.description: Handcrafted Belgian chocolate truffles with ganache centers, dusted with premium cocoa. An indulgent gift for yourself or a loved one.
products.ingredients: Belgian dark chocolate, heavy cream, butter, cocoa powder, natural flavors

products.name: Mango Cream Cake
products.description: A refreshing seasonal favorite — layers of light vanilla sponge with fresh Alphonso mango cream, mango compote, and glazed mango slices on top.
products.ingredients: Vanilla sponge, Alphonso mango pulp, whipped cream, mango slices, sugar syrup

products.name: Diwali Special Gift Box
products.description: A festive Diwali gift box featuring assorted chocolates, butter cookies, and dry fruit barfi. Beautifully packaged in a golden gift box. Perfect for gifting.
products.ingredients: Assorted chocolates, butter cookies, dry fruit barfi, roasted nuts
